# Heaven Beauty

> Effortless glow and natural tints — discover beauty products that feel as good as they look.

Heaven Beauty is an online boutique for skincare, makeup, and self-care essentials. We curate clean, effective products designed to highlight your natural beauty with minimal effort.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Browse featured collections and hero highlights.
- [Shop](/shop): Explore the full product catalog.
- [Our Story](/our-story): Learn about Heaven Beauty and what we stand for.
- [Cart](/cart): Review your selected items before checkout.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of site URLs.
